description: What is the primary geographical and/or platform area of distribution for a given aesthetic?
sample: Cottagecore, TikTok | Cottagecore, TikTok (revival) | Cottagecore, Tumblr

description: During which time period did the digital turn in aesthetics creation occur? (aesthetics with origin period 2000+)
sample: Sparkledog, 2000s, 2000 | Sparkledog, 2000s (Initial Popularity), 2000 | Sparkledog, 2000s (Third Wave/Mainstream Subculture), 2000

description: Which aesthetics are associated with specific subcultures?
sparql: (no query)
notes: NOT ANSWERABLE — no ae-ont:associatedSubculture property in graph. Closest proxy: ae-ont:hasIconicFigure links to known community figures.

description: Which artworks (films, music, literature) are associated with a given aesthetic?
Which aesthetics are associated with works of a specific medium (e.g. Film)?
Which aesthetics are linked to a specific geographic location of origin?
sample: 2010s Soft Kawaii, Japan and the West | Agejo, Japan | Agejo, Japan (modern-day Tokyo)

description: Which age groups are most engaged with a given aesthetic movement?
sparql: (no query)
notes: NOT ANSWERABLE — no demographic/age-group data in graph.

description: Which iconic figures / communities are associated with a particular aesthetic?
sample: Dark Cabaret, Amanda Palmer (The Dresden Dolls) | Dark Cabaret, Bertolt Brecht | Dark Cabaret, Brian Viglione (The Dresden Dolls)
notes: Proxy via ae-ont:hasIconicFigure (no explicit 'social group' class). Example: Dark Cabaret (13 figures).

description: Which brands are associated with a given aesthetic, and what values does it carry?
Which aesthetics share a given color palette entry?
Which motifs are characteristic of a particular aesthetic?
Which brands are associated with a given aesthetic?
Which aesthetics are visually or stylistically related to a given one?
Which aesthetics are subgenres of a given aesthetic?
Which aesthetics have influenced a given aesthetic? (via ae-ont:follows = was preceded by)
notes: ae-ont:follows maps box__preceded_by; A follows B = B influenced A. Example: DIY Punk follows Punk.

description: Which aesthetics are related to a given one and share at least one value?
Which aesthetics have the highest number of sub-aesthetics or derivative movements?
Which aesthetics have the longest chain of influence (precedes+)?
Which aesthetics share fashion-related motifs as defining elements?
Which aesthetic has the highest number of associated brands?
notes: No causal 'influence' data; query returns brand association count as proxy.
